summary: Validates a string as either a media type or resolvable extension, returning a media type string with a default charset when applicable.
signature_intent: Accepts one value and returns either false or a media type string.
behavior: Returns false for missing or non-string input.
Resolves extension-like strings to media types.
Returns false when no media type can be determined.
Adds a charset parameter when one is not already present and a default charset is known.
Returns the final media type string.
edge_cases: Existing charset information is preserved without adding another charset.
